# Jaydev Multicomm Pvt. Ltd.
# Industrial Chemical Exporter - Rajkot, Gujarat, India

## Company
- Name: Jaydev Multicomm Pvt. Ltd.
- Address: 911 RK Supreme, 150 Ft Ring Road, Rajkot, Gujarat – 360005, India
- Email: sales@jaydevmulticomm.com
- Website: https://www.jaydevmulticomm.com
- WhatsApp (Darsh): +919987539258
- WhatsApp (Office): +919978479258
- IEC Registered Exporter: Yes
- GACL Authorized Partner: Yes
- Grasim/Aditya Birla Authorized Partner: Yes

## Products (32 industrial chemicals)
Caustic Soda Flakes (NaOH, CAS 1310-73-2), Caustic Soda Lye (NaOH), Caustic Soda Prills (NaOH),
Soda Ash (Na2CO3, CAS 497-19-8), Stable Bleaching Powder (CaOCl2), Sulphuric Acid (H2SO4, CAS 7664-93-9),
Hydrochloric Acid (HCl, CAS 7647-01-0), Phosphoric Acid (H3PO4), PAC Poly Aluminium Chloride (CAS 1327-41-9),
SMBS Sodium Metabisulphite (Na2S2O5, CAS 7681-57-4), Sodium Hypochlorite (NaOCl), TCCA (CAS 87-90-1),
Calcium Hypochlorite, Chloroform (CHCl3), Methylene Chloride (CH2Cl2), Carbon Tetrachloride (CCl4),
Ethyl Acetate, Sodium Sulphate Anhydrous, Sodium Bicarbonate, Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Acetate,
Sodium Chlorate, Hydrogen Peroxide (H2O2, CAS 7722-84-1), Calcium Chloride (CaCl2, CAS 10043-52-4),
Hydrazine Hydrate, Chlorinated Paraffin, Anhydrous Aluminium Chloride (AlCl3), Caustic Potash Lye (KOH),
Caustic Potash Flakes (KOH), Sulphur (S), Beta Naphthol, Sodium Nitrate (NaNO3)

## Export Markets
- East Africa: Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda, DRC, Zambia - 15-20 days - Mombasa, Dar es Salaam
- West Africa: Nigeria, Ghana, Côte d'Ivoire - 18-25 days - Lagos, Tema
- GCC & Middle East: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman - 7-12 days - Jebel Ali, Ras Tanura
- Southeast Asia: Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam - 12-18 days - Port Klang, HCMC

## Industries Served
Water Treatment, Chlor-Alkali, Textile & Dyeing, Mining, Plastic/PVC, Detergent/FMCG, Agro/Fertilizer, Food/Pharma
